project.name: UU鲨 AI 对话 UI 重做
project.styleDefinitionBrief: Desktop app AI chat floating window, Apple-inspired restrained design, brand blue #007aff, dual-panel (conversation list + chat area), compact information-dense tool UI
project.designRead: Desktop app tool UI / internal power user / restrained professional / information-dense / avoid colorful decoration

colorSystem.primaryColorRole: single brand hue #007aff for primary actions, active states, send button, profile selector active indicator
colorSystem.brandHuePolicy: no secondary brand hue; all identity uses primary blue tints or neutral
colorSystem.stateColors: success green for capability tags, destructive red for delete buttons

styleContinuityAnchors.shapeSystem: compact 8px radius for panels, 6px for buttons/inputs, 4px for tags, full-round for minimized bubble
styleContinuityAnchors.typographySystem: Noto Sans CJK SC, 13px body, 12px secondary, 11px timestamps
styleContinuityAnchors.spacingSystem: tight 8-12px padding, 4px gaps, 8px section spacing inside floating window
styleContinuityAnchors.componentLanguage: minimal flat buttons, borderless icon buttons, subtle 1px borders, no decorative shadows except floating layers
styleContinuityAnchors.surfaceAndDepth: border-based separation; shadow only for floating window and dropdown popover; shadow-xl for floating window, shadow-md for dropdown
styleContinuityAnchors.imageryAndIconography: inline SVG icons only, no raster images
styleContinuityAnchors.interactionTone: quiet functional: hover background change, no animation, instant state feedback

sharedProjectShellContract.navigationShell: No global nav - each page is a self-contained floating window or settings section
sharedProjectShellContract.primaryColorSystem: single primary brand hue; no secondary/accent brand hue
sharedProjectShellContract.typographySystem: Noto Sans CJK SC / Noto Sans / sans-serif, 13px body, tight leading
sharedProjectShellContract.surfaceDepthModel: borders for static separation, shadows only for floating layers (window, dropdown, confirm dialog)
sharedProjectShellContract.ctaStyle: compact 28-30px height, 6px radius, primary fill for send/action, ghost for secondary
sharedProjectShellContract.alignmentRules: left-aligned text, flex column layout, sticky input area at bottom

pages.title: AI 浮窗 - 亮色模式
pages.requirements: Complete AI floating window in light mode: title bar with shark icon + title + Profile dropdown + [+] [−] [×] buttons, left conversation list (160px, 3 conversations with active highlight, new conversation button), right chat area with user/AI message bubbles, image preview row, input area with web-search toggle (active) + image upload + textarea + send button, tool status bar
pages.visualNorthStar: compact desktop tool panel, dual-column layout, minimal chrome, functional density

continuityAnchors.colorSystem: brand blue for primary actions and active states
continuityAnchors.surfaceDepthModel: border-based separation, shadow only for the floating window container

pages.title: AI 浮窗 - 暗色模式
pages.requirements: Same layout as light mode but with .dark class: all semantic CSS variables auto-switch to dark palette, demonstrating full dark mode support with conversation list, messages, and input area
pages.visualNorthStar: compact desktop tool panel in dark theme

pages.title: Profile 下拉选择器
pages.requirements: Profile selector dropdown overlay: shows 4 API profiles (DeepSeek with checkmark, OpenAI GPT-4o, Qwen, Ollama local) each with capability icons (web/image), separator, '管理配置...' link at bottom

pages.title: 删除会话确认弹窗
pages.requirements: Custom confirm dialog overlay on top of the floating window: semi-transparent backdrop, centered dialog with warning icon, '确定删除此会话？' text, '删除后不可恢复' subtext, cancel and confirm buttons
pages.visualNorthStar: centered modal dialog, minimal and clear

pages.title: 最小化气泡
pages.requirements: 44x44 circular minimized bubble with shark icon, brand primary background, centered on page, no red notification badge

pages.title: 设置页 - AI 配置管理
pages.requirements: Settings page AI configuration section: title 'AI 配置', API configuration list with 3 profiles (DeepSeek, OpenAI, Ollama) each showing name, model, capability tags, edit/delete buttons, '+ 添加配置' button at bottom

continuityAnchors.shapeSystem: 8px card radius, 6px button radius, 4px tag radius
continuityAnchors.surfaceDepthModel: border-based card separation, no shadow on static cards

pages.title: 设置页 - 编辑 API 配置
pages.requirements: Settings page with expanded edit form: profile list above (compact), edit form below with fields for name, provider dropdown, API key with show/hide toggle, API URL, model, temperature slider (0.7), max tokens input, auto-detected capability tags, save/cancel buttons, test button

continuityAnchors.colorSystem: brand primary for save button, success for detected capabilities
continuityAnchors.surfaceDepthModel: border for form fields, subtle background for form area
